case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSHUA BENJAMIN HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,421.48 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSHUA BENJAMIN DE LEON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED MAY-30-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSHUA BENJAMIN DE LEON
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-12-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSHUA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSHUA BENJAMIN DE LEON $1,351.48 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,436.48, COURT HAS DEDUCTED FIVE LATE PAYMENT FEES AFTER DEFENDANT'S DEFAULT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT OWE LATE FEES AFTER THE LOAN ACCELERATED AND HE DID NOT PAY. IN CASE OF ACCELERATION THERE IS ONE FINAL DUE DATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
